name: evidence-bundle-fleet-summary-action
description: GitHub Action that walks a directory of evidence-bundle manifests, counts by purpose, surfaces governance gaps (bundle-expired, unsigned-regulated-bundle, cross-bundle-hash-collision, oversized-bundle, no-provenance), posts a Markdown summary as a PR comment, and fails the build when high-severity findings exist. Fourth in the Action family — completes the per-protocol fleet-summary action quartet across A2A / MCP / prompts / evidence.
author: mizcausevic-dev
